title: cota latealata
intro: Cota latealata, also known as the meadow cotula or sea cudweed, is a flowering plant belonging to the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Cota latealata include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and soothe respiratory problems. Cota latealata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
